description: MCP server for wallabag read-it-later entries, tags, and annotations.
name: io.github.rusty4444/wallabag-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the wallabag instance, e.g. https://wallabag.example.com
environmentVariables.name: WALLABAG_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Existing OAuth access token; skips password grant if provided
environmentVariables.name: WALLABAG_ACCESS_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: OAuth client id; required unless WALLABAG_ACCESS_TOKEN is set
environmentVariables.name: WALLABAG_CLIENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: OAuth client secret; required unless WALLABAG_ACCESS_TOKEN is set
environmentVariables.name: WALLABAG_CLIENT_SECRET

environmentVariables.description: wallabag username; required unless WALLABAG_ACCESS_TOKEN is set
environmentVariables.name: WALLABAG_USERNAME

environmentVariables.description: wallabag password; required unless WALLABAG_ACCESS_TOKEN is set
environmentVariables.name: WALLABAG_PASSWORD

title: wallabag MCP
